headline: Crocs: Growth Has Stalled Out, But The Stock Hasn't Reacted Accordingly
summary: Crocs (CROX) Q1 2026 sales fell 1.69% YoY despite a beat; margins and buybacks face peak-risk, overvaluation, and brand reliance.
